zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde Mahaut De Crésecque於1225年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫奧德納爾德時，她的父親Anseau de Crésecques33歲，母親Béatrix de Guînes25歲。她於1245年與Graf Jan I van Oudenaarde結婚。她去世於1296年在法國皮卡迪索姆皮易尼享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde Mahaut De Crésecque was born in 1225, in Oudenaarde, East Flanders, Belgium, her father, Anseau de Crésecques, was 33 and her mother, Béatrix de Guînes, was 25. She married Graf Jan I van Oudenaarde in 1245. She died in 1296, in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde Mahaut De Crésecque est née en 1225, à Oudenaarde, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Anseau de Crésecques, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Béatrix de Guînes, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Graf Jan I van Oudenaarde en 1245. Elle est décédée en 1296, à Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde Mahaut De Crésecque 1225 in Oudenaarde, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anseau de Crésecques 33 und ihre Mutter Béatrix de Guînes 25. Sie hat 1245 Graf Jan I van Oudenaarde geheiratet. Sie starb 1296 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde Mahaut De Crésecque è nata il nel 1225 nel Oudenaarde, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, sua padre, Anseau de Crésecques, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Béatrix de Guînes, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Graf Jan I van Oudenaarde nel 1245. Morì nel 1296, nel Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde Mahaut De Crésecqueが1225年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンオウデナアルドで生まれた時，父Anseau de Crésecquesは33歳，母Béatrix de Guînesは25歳であった。1245年にGraf Jan I van Oudenaardeと結婚した。彼女は1296年にフランスピカーディソンメピククイグニーで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde Mahaut De Crésecque(이)가 1225년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 우데나아르드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anseau de Crésecques(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrix de Guînes(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1245년 Graf Jan I van Oudenaarde(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1296년 프랑스 피카디 솜 피c키그니에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde Mahaut De Crésecque nasceu em 1225, em Oudenaarde, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Anseau de Crésecques, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Béatrix de Guînes, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Graf Jan I van Oudenaarde em 1245. Ela faleceu em 1296, em Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, França, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde Mahaut De Crésecque родилась в 1225 г. в местности оуденаард, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Anseau de Crésecques было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Béatrix de Guînes, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf Jan I van Oudenaarde в 1245 г. Она умерла в 1296 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde Mahaut De Crésecque nació en 1225, en Oudenaarde, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Anseau de Crésecques, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Béatrix de Guînes, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Graf Jan I van Oudenaarde en 1245. Murió en 1296, en Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 71 años.
